tasks.title: Combine dashboard surfaces
tasks.objective: Render creator and participant dashboard content on one shared dashboard page.
authority: Add route and renderer for combined dashboard while preserving existing dashboard routes.
acceptance_criteria: `/dashboard` shows creator and participant sections on the same page.
Creator and participant credit summaries and unlocked links still render.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when combined route is covered and legacy routes still work.

tasks.title: Separate navigation from app name
tasks.objective: Move navigation links to the opposite end of the topbar from the app name and expose one dashboard nav option.
authority: Update topbar markup and CSS without changing product identity or unrelated page layout.
acceptance_criteria: The app name is its own brand link.
Navigation links are grouped and aligned to the opposite end.
The navigation shows one Dashboard link instead of separate creator and participant dashboard links.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when all rendered topbars use separated brand/nav structure.
